query:
You are a competitive intelligence analyst building a deep benchmark profile of Oscar (https://hioscar.com).

Search https://hioscar.com, https://hioscar.com/pricing, https://hioscar.com/plans, Crunchbase, LinkedIn, G2, Capterra, TechCrunch, and recent news. Run several searches with adjacent keywords to ensure full breadth.

Extract the following — include a source URL for each section:

PRICING: Visit https://hioscar.com/pricing and https://hioscar.com/plans. List every plan name, exact monthly USD price, exact annual USD price, free tier availability (true/false), any recent pricing changes.

FUNDING: Search Crunchbase and news for 'Oscar funding'. Extract: funding stage, latest round amount USD, round date (YYYY-MM-DD), round type (Seed/Series A/B/C/etc), total raised USD, all investor names.

COMPANY: Find the LinkedIn company page URL for Oscar. Extract current employee count. Note any headcount growth signals from LinkedIn or news.

FOUNDERS: Find CEO and founder names for Oscar. Extract their LinkedIn profile URLs. Search for recent LinkedIn posts or press statements from founders (last 6 months) — extract the key signal or quote for each.

SIGNALS: Search news and press from the last 6 months about Oscar. For each item extract: date, headline, signal type (funding/product/hiring/partnership/press), source URL.

POSITIONING: List key differentiators of Oscar vs alternatives. Identify primary target customer segment. List up to 5 publicly known customers — for each, classify: 'Grand compte' (CAC40/Fortune500), 'ETI' (mid-size 250-5000 employees), 'PME' (<250 employees), 'Startup', or 'Consumer'. Include industry and any concrete result.

ACQUISITION: Find whether Oscar has been acquired. If yes: acquirer name, amount in EUR, year, source URL. If not acquired, return acquired=false.

WEAKNESSES: Search G2, Capterra, Reddit, Hacker News for user complaints or limitations of Oscar. List the most recurring themes.
answer:
**Executive Summary**

Oscar Health is a publicly traded health insurance provider that has aggressively expanded its Individual Coverage Health Reimbursement Arrangement (ICHRA) offerings and Affordable Care Act (ACA) market footprint for 2026. Despite reporting $11.7 billion in 2025 revenue and market share gains, the company is navigating profitability challenges, evidenced by recent workforce reductions and a requested 28% average premium rate hike for 2026 to offset higher market morbidity. Oscar remains an independent entity, positioning itself as a consumer-centric "pirate ship" disrupting traditional employer-sponsored insurance models.

---

### 1. Company & Leadership Profile

**Corporate Overview**
*   **LinkedIn Profile:** [Oscar Health | LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/oscar-health/)
*   **Acquisition Status:** Acquired = False. Oscar Health remains an independent, publicly traded company (NYSE: OSCR) [Alphabet-backed Oscar Health raises $1.2 billion in IPO | Reuters](https://www.reuters.com/article/world/americas/alphabet-backed-oscar-health-raises-12-billion-in-ipo-idUSKBN2AV07H/).
*   **Employee Count:** Estimates for mid-2026 range from 2,305 to 2,728 employees. PitchBook reports 2,305 (as of April 2026), TradingView reports 2,310 (as of June 2026), and Revelio Labs reports 2,728 [Oscar Health 2026 Company Profile: Stock Performance & Earnings | PitchBook](https://pitchbook.com/profiles/company/58034-35); [NYSE:OSCR - Oscar Health, Inc.](https://www.tradingview.com/symbols/NYSE-OSCR/); [How many employees work at Oscar Health? | Revelio Labs](https://www.reveliolabs.com/companies/oscar-health/employees/).
*   **Headcount Signals:** The company has experienced recent workforce contractions. Oscar announced a reduction in force to cut $60 million in administrative expenses following Q2 2025 net losses [Oscar Health misses estimates in Q2, plans layoffs and inks Hy-Vee-branded ICHRA plan](https://www.fiercehealthcare.com/payers/oscar-health-misses-estimates-q2-plans-rif-and-announces-hyvee-ichra-partnership). Employees reported a mass layoff on August 26, 2025, and a subsequent 40-person layoff in mid-December 2025 affecting engineering and HR teams [Oscar Health Layoffs Discussions - Blind](https://www.teamblind.com/company/Oscar-Health/posts/oscar-health-layoffs); [Oscar Health - Secret Layoffs | Glassdoor](https://www.glassdoor.com/Reviews/Employee-Review-Oscar-Health-E812257-RVW82836221.htm). Revelio Labs noted a 6.3% overall headcount decline in 2025 [How many employees work at Oscar Health? | Revelio Labs](https://www.reveliolabs.com/companies/oscar-health/employees/).

**Founders & Executive Leadership**
*   **Mark Bertolini (CEO):** Assumed the role on April 3, 2023. [Senior Management Team | Oscar](https://www.hioscar.com/about/team). Profile: [Mark Bertolini - CEO of Oscar Health](https://www.linkedin.com/in/markbertolini/).
    *   *Recent Signal:* Bertolini recently advocated for decoupling insurance from employment, stating, "Health insurance should be tied to you – not your employer." [Mara Mitchel - Oscar Health | LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mara-mitchel-48b4a85/). He also noted that hospital spending drove 40% of US healthcare cost growth ($692 billion) between 2022-2024 [Mark Bertolini - CEO of Oscar Health](https://www.linkedin.com/in/markbertolini/).
*   **Mario Schlosser (Co-Founder & CTO):** Transitioned from CEO to President of Technology in April 2023. [Oscar Health Inc. - Governance - Board of Directors - Person Details](https://ir.hioscar.com/governance/board-of-directors/person-details/default.aspx?ItemId=3c076fb6-5d17-44ab-b075-50d98bd22a7a). Profile: [Mario Schlosser - Oscar Health | LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mario-schlosser/).
    *   *Recent Signal:* Commenting on AI, Schlosser stated that "human in the loop" requires further definition, specifically demanding "clear accountability, audibility, and monitoring." [Mario Schlosser - Oscar Health | LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mario-schlosser/).
*   **Joshua Kushner (Co-Founder):** Currently serves as Vice Chairman and Director [Who Owns Oscar Health Company? – Pestel-analysis.com](https://pestel-analysis.com/blogs/owners/hioscar).
*   **Kevin Nazemi (Co-Founder):** Exited active duties in early 2015 [Who Owns Oscar Health Company? – MatrixBCG.com](https://matrixbcg.com/blogs/owners/hioscar).

---

### 2. Pricing & Product Strategy

**Plan Tiers and Availability**
Oscar Health offers ACA plans across four metal tiers: Bronze (60% coverage), Silver (70% coverage), Gold (80% coverage), and Catastrophic [Health insurance made for real life | Oscar](https://hioscar.com/plans). 
*   **Free Tier:** True. Oscar offers plans starting at $0 monthly premiums for qualifying members [Health insurance made for real life | Oscar](https://hioscar.com/plans).

**2026 Plan Names & Exact Monthly Pricing**
*Note: The following exact monthly USD prices apply to a 21-year-old non-tobacco user in Pennsylvania for the 2026 plan year.* [Oscar Health Plan of Pennsylvania, Inc. – Individual Plans](https://www.pa.gov/content/dam/copapwp-pagov/en/insurance/documents/posted-filings-reports-orders/aca-health-rate-filings/plan-year-2026/individual-market/oscar-rate-change-summary-indv-mkt.pdf)
*   **Plan 98517PA0010024** (Rating Area 3): $381.93 / month
*   **Plan 98517PA0010055** (Rating Area 7): $413.33 / month
*   **Plan 98517PA0010013** (Rating Area 8): $414.38 / month
*   **Plan 98517PA0010036** (Rating Area 7): $459.62 / month
*   **Plan 98517PA0010025** (Rating Area 3): $504.72 / month

Additional 2026 plan names include:
*   *Silver Simple PCP Saver* [More of Oscar's Hottest 2026 OEP ACA Markets - Agility: Life and Health Insurance Blog](https://blog.enrollinsurance.com/2025/11/more-of-oscars-hottest-2026-oep-aca-markets-nov-18-2025/)
*   *Silver Elite Plus* [More of Oscar's Hottest 2026 OEP ACA Markets - Agility: Life and Health Insurance Blog](https://blog.enrollinsurance.com/2025/11/more-of-oscars-hottest-2026-oep-aca-markets-nov-18-2025/)
*   *Bronze Elite + PCP Saver Plus* [More of Oscar's Hottest 2026 OEP ACA Markets - Agility: Life and Health Insurance Blog](https://blog.enrollinsurance.com/2025/11/more-of-oscars-hottest-2026-oep-aca-markets-nov-18-2025/)
*   *Hy-Vee + Oscar* (Off-exchange ICHRA) [More of Oscar's Hottest 2026 OEP ACA Markets - Agility: Life and Health Insurance Blog](https://blog.enrollinsurance.com/2025/11/more-of-oscars-hottest-2026-oep-aca-markets-nov-18-2025/)
*   *Silver Classic Standard HMO $6000 $40* (Georgia) [Oscar Health Plan of Georgia Silver Classic Standard HMO $6000 $40 (None) | GA Health Insurance 2026](https://www.healthsherpa.com/states/georgia-aca/58081GA0010052-silver-classic-standard-hmo-6000-40)

**Recent Pricing Changes**
Oscar is implementing aggressive rate hikes for 2026 to combat higher market morbidity and the expiration of enhanced premium tax credits. 
*   **National:** Implementing a 28% average rate increase for 2026 [Oscar Health outlines 28% rate hikes for 2026 as pricing strategy adapts to higher morbidity (NYSE:OSCR) | Seeking Alpha](https://seekingalpha.com/news/4518332-oscar-health-outlines-28-percent-rate-hikes-for-2026-as-pricing-strategy-adapts-to-higher).
*   **Iowa:** Requested an 18.82% average increase (ranging from 16.32% to 21.38%) [Health Insurance Rate Increase Data | Iowa Insurance Division](https://iid.iowa.gov/legal-resources/data/health-insurance-rate-increase-data).
*   **New York:** Requested a 13% increase, which regulators reduced to an approved 7% [Health Care for All New York | Premiums](https://hcfany.org/category/premiums/).

---

### 3. Funding & Financials

*   **Funding Stage:** Public (Post-IPO)
*   **Total Raised (Pre-IPO):** $1.633 billion across 12 rounds [Oscar Stock Price, Funding, Valuation, Revenue & Financial Statements](https://www.cbinsights.com/company/oscar-health-insurance-co/financials).
*   **IPO Details:** Went public on March 3, 2021, raising $1.2 billion to $1.44 billion at $39 per share, achieving a valuation between $7.7 billion and $9.5 billion [Alphabet-backed Oscar Health raises $1.2 billion in IPO | Reuters](https://www.reuters.com/article/world/americas/alphabet-backed-oscar-health-raises-12-billion-in-ipo-idUSKBN2AV07H/); [Oscar Health prices IPO at $39 and secures a $9.5B valuation | TechCrunch](https://techcrunch.com/2021/03/03/oscar-health-prices-ipo-at-39-and-secures-a-9-5b-valuation/).
*   **Latest Funding Event:** In early 2025, Oscar entered a $475 million secured revolving credit facility (with an option to add up to $100 million) active through February 6, 2029 [Oscar Health (NYSE: OSCR) adds $475M credit line and targets 2026 profit rebound](https://www.stocktitan.net/sec-filings/OSCR/8-k-oscar-health-inc-reports-material-event-90a838a0da8a.html).
*   **Latest Equity Round (Pre-IPO):** $140 million Series Unknown venture round on December 17, 2020, led by Tiger Global Management [Venture Round - Oscar Health - 2020-12-17 - Crunchbase Funding Round Profile](https://www.crunchbase.com/funding_round/oscar-series-unknown--deb7a4eb).
*   **Key Investors:** General Catalyst Partners, Founders Fund, Formation 8, Horizons Ventures, Wellington Management Company, Goldman Sachs, Google Ventures, Google Capital, Fidelity Investments, Alphabet (CapitalG and Verily), 8VC, Khosla Ventures, Thrive Capital, Lakestar, Baillie Gifford, Coatue, and Tiger Global Management [Multiple Sources].

---

### 4. Positioning & Market Strategy

**Differentiators**
Oscar Health positions itself as a "pirate ship" challenging traditional insurers by offering tailored insurance markets and integrated mental health services [AI, Personalization, and Disrupting the Status Quo with Mark Bertolini, CEO of Oscar Health – Health Podcast Network](https://healthpodcastnetwork.com/episodes/outcomes-rocket/ai-personalization-and-disrupting-the-status-quo-with-mark-bertolini-ceo-of-oscar-health/). The company's core mission is to behave "like a doctor in the family" [About us | Oscar](https://www.hioscar.com/about). Strategically, Oscar is heavily differentiating via the ICHRA market, framing it as a necessary shift from "defined benefit to defined contribution" in healthcare [Mario Schlosser - Oscar Health | LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mario-schlosser/).

**Target Customer Segment**
Oscar primarily targets individual consumers on the ACA exchanges and employers transitioning to defined-contribution ICHRA models [Mara Mitchel - Oscar Health | LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mara-mitchel-48b4a85/); [More of Oscar's Hottest 2026 OEP ACA Markets - Agility: Life and Health Insurance Blog](https://blog.enrollinsurance.com/2025/11/more-of-oscars-hottest-2026-oep-aca-markets-nov-18-2025/).

**Known Customers / Partners**
Because Oscar is a health insurer rather than a traditional B2B SaaS vendor, its "customers" are primarily individual consumers and strategic co-branding partners:
1.  **Hy-Vee** | *Classification: Grand compte* | *Industry: Retail* | *Result:* Launched a co-branded off-exchange ICHRA plan ("Hy-Vee + Oscar") in Des Moines, Dallas, and Polk Counties for 2026 [More of Oscar's Hottest 2026 OEP ACA Markets - Agility: Life and Health Insurance Blog](https://blog.enrollinsurance.com/2025/11/more-of-oscars-hottest-2026-oep-aca-markets-nov-18-2025/).
2.  **Atrium Health** | *Classification: Grand compte* | *Industry: Healthcare* | *Result:* Launched co-branded plans in Charlotte and Winston-Salem for 2026 [More of Oscar's Hottest 2026 OEP ACA Markets - Agility: Life and Health Insurance Blog](https://blog.enrollinsurance.com/2025/11/more-of-oscars-hottest-2026-oep-aca-markets-nov-18-2025/).
3.  **Individual ACA Enrollees** | *Classification: Consumer* | *Industry: N/A* | *Result:* Access to metal-tier plans across 20 states for the 2026 enrollment period [Oscar Health Insurance Review: Is It Worth It in 2026? | Millennial Hawk](https://millennialhawk.com/oscar-health-review/).

---

### 5. Recent Signals (Last 6 Months)

*   **Product/Pricing:** *Oscar Health outlines 28% rate hikes for 2026 as pricing strategy adapts to higher morbidity* (Recent 2026) [Seeking Alpha](https://seekingalpha.com/news/4518332-oscar-health-outlines-28-percent-rate-hikes-for-2026-as-pricing-strategy-adapts-to-higher)
*   **Product/Expansion:** *More of Oscar's Hottest 2026 OEP ACA Markets* (Nov 18, 2025) [Agility: Life and Health Insurance Blog](https://blog.enrollinsurance.com/2025/11/more-of-oscars-hottest-2026-oep-aca-markets-nov-18-2025/)
*   **Funding/Financial:** *Oscar Health (NYSE: OSCR) adds $475M credit line and targets 2026 profit rebound* (Early 2025) [StockTitan](https://www.stocktitan.net/sec-filings/OSCR/8-k-oscar-health-inc-reports-material-event-90a838a0da8a.html)
*   **Hiring/Partnership:** *Oscar Health misses estimates in Q2, plans layoffs and inks Hy-Vee-branded ICHRA plan* (Mid-2025) [FierceHealthcare](https://www.fiercehealthcare.com/payers/oscar-health-misses-estimates-q2-plans-rif-and-announces-hyvee-ichra-partnership)

---

### 6. Analysis / Risk Assessment

Oscar Health is currently navigating a volatile transition period. While the company generated $11.7 billion in revenue in 2025 and is expanding its footprint to 20 states for 2026 (adding Alabama and Mississippi), it is simultaneously executing aggressive cost-cutting measures [Oscar Health - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/oscar-health-inc/371638989); [Oscar Health Insurance Review: Is It Worth It in 2026? | Millennial Hawk](https://millennialhawk.com/oscar-health-review/). The necessity to cut $60 million in administrative expenses via layoffs, combined with a massive 28% average rate hike for 2026, indicates severe pressure from rising healthcare utilization (morbidity) and the loss of enhanced premium tax credits [Oscar Health misses estimates in Q2, plans layoffs and inks Hy-Vee-branded ICHRA plan](https://www.fiercehealthcare.com/payers/oscar-health-misses-estimates-q2-plans-rif-and-announces-hyvee-ichra-partnership); [Oscar Health outlines 28% rate hikes for 2026 as pricing strategy adapts to higher morbidity (NYSE:OSCR) | Seeking Alpha](https://seekingalpha.com/news/4518332-oscar-health-outlines-28-percent-rate-hikes-for-2026-as-pricing-strategy-adapts-to-higher). 

Strategically, CEO Mark Bertolini is pivoting the company heavily toward the ICHRA market, betting that employers will increasingly prefer defined-contribution models over traditional group health plans. The $475 million credit facility secured in early 2025 provides necessary liquidity to weather this transition and target a profit rebound by the end of 2026 [Oscar Health (NYSE: OSCR) adds $475M credit line and targets 2026 profit rebound](https://www.stocktitan.net/sec-filings/OSCR/8-k-oscar-health-inc-reports-material-event-90a838a0da8a.html).

---

### 7. Gaps and Limitations

Based strictly on the provided research findings, the following requested data points could not be fulfilled:
*   **Exact Annual USD Price:** The findings provided exact monthly premiums for specific plans in Pennsylvania, but did not provide the pre-calculated or explicitly stated exact annual USD prices.
*   **Traditional B2B Customers:** As a B2C/B2B2C health insurer, Oscar does not have traditional software buyers. Only 3 customer/partner entities (Hy-Vee, Atrium Health, and general consumers) were identified in the text, falling short of the requested 5.
*   **Weaknesses (G2/Capterra/Reddit/Hacker News):** The provided findings contained zero data regarding user complaints or product limitations from G2, Capterra, Reddit, or Hacker News. The only negative signals found were employee complaints regarding layoffs on Blind and Glassdoor.
